# Shrutam (शृतम्) — Complete Reference

> Shrutam is India's first audio-first AI personalized learning app for school students (Class 5-10). It features an AI teacher called SAAVI who teaches in 5 Indian languages, is available 24/7, and includes India's first blind-accessible learning mode. Priced at ₹199/month. Covers CG Board and CBSE syllabi. Built by Aarambha. Domain: shrutam.ai. Launching May 20, 2026.

## What Problem Does Shrutam Solve?

India has 250 million+ school students. The core problems:

- 68% students learn by rote memorization — no understanding
- Private tutors cost ₹3,000+/month — unaffordable for 90% families
- 6 lakh+ villages have no quality tutor available
- 60% students are Hindi-medium but all edtech apps are English-first
- 5 million blind students in India — ZERO edtech serves them
- Students know the answer in Hindi but can't express it in English
- No AI tutor exists that speaks Hinglish natively (not translated)

## What Makes Shrutam Different from Competitors?

| Feature | BYJU'S | Vedantu | Physics Wallah | Shrutam |
|---------|--------|---------|----------------|---------|
| Price/month | ₹1,500+ | ₹1,000+ | ₹500+ | ₹199 |
| Language | English | English | Hindi (dubbed) | 5 languages (native) |
| Blind support | No | No | No | Full — FREE forever |
| AI personalization | Limited | No | No | Deep — 10 teaching styles |
| CG Board | No | No | No | Yes |
| Available | Recorded | Live scheduled | Recorded | 24/7 AI |
| Parent portal | Basic | No | No | Full — WhatsApp reports |

## SAAVI — The AI Teacher

SAAVI = Study AI Assistant & Voice Intelligence (सावी)

- **Age feel**: 24-26 year old elder sister (didi)
- **Personality**: Warm, patient, never judges, genuinely smart, celebrates wins
- **Speaking style**: Natural Hinglish — "Arre yaar! Ped ka apna kitchen hota hai!"
- **Teaching approach**: Starts with real-life Indian examples, builds intuition before definition
- **Signature phrases**: "Arre yaar!", "Ruko ruko!", "Simple si baat hai...", "Koi baat nahi yaar"
- **Never says**: "Wrong!", "Incorrect", "See the diagram", robotic definitions
- **Ask Like 10**: Can explain one concept 10 different ways until the student understands

## Blind Mode — India's First

50 lakh blind students in India. No edtech app serves them. Shrutam's Blind Mode:

- Never says "see the diagram" — uses verbal descriptions instead
- Math spoken aloud: "x squared" not "x²", "3 divided by 4" not "3/4"
- Tables converted to spoken numbered lists
- Scribe dictation cues for board exams: "[Scribe: capital P] Photosynthesis [Scribe: new line]"
- Voice-only quiz mode — questions read aloud, student speaks answer
- Compatible with: TalkBack (Android), VoiceOver (iOS), NVDA, JAWS
- FREE forever — Aarambha's social commitment

## Content Architecture

Every topic has structured content:
- Hook → Example → Explanation → Interactive Sim → MCQ → Flashcards → Summary → Quiz
- Two versions: screenText (readable) + audioText (SAAVI's teaching voice)
- Content generated natively per language — never translated
- 3-layer validation: Sympy symbolic (maths) + cross-model voting + human review

## Boards Covered

### Active (Launch)
- **CBSE (NCERT)**: Class 5-10, all subjects, Hindi + English
- **CG Board (CGBSE)**: Class 5-10, all subjects, Hindi — follows NCERT syllabus

### Coming Soon
- **Maharashtra SSC**: Balbharati textbooks, Marathi medium
- **MP Board (MPBSE)**: Hindi medium
- **AP/Telangana Board**: SCERT textbooks, Telugu medium

## Subjects (per board, per class)
1. Science (विज्ञान)
2. Mathematics (गणित)
3. Hindi (हिंदी)
4. Social Science (सामाजिक विज्ञान)
5. English (अंग्रेज़ी)

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Includes |
|------|-------|----------|
| Free Trial | ₹0 (7 days) | 2 subjects, basic SAAVI, 5 doubts/day |
| Shrutam Pro | ₹199/month | All subjects, unlimited SAAVI, mock exams, photo solver, parent portal |
| Blind Mode | FREE forever | Full access for blind/visually impaired students |
| BPL Category | Subsidized | Nominal rates for Below Poverty Line students |

## Target Audience

- **Primary**: Hindi-medium parents in Tier 2/3/4 Indian cities + villages (Raipur, Bilaspur, Durg, Korba, Jagdalpur — Chhattisgarh)
- **Secondary**: Students themselves (Class 5-10, age 10-16)
- **Tertiary**: Blind/visually impaired students (5 million in India)

## Technology

- AI-powered adaptive learning with real-time difficulty adjustment
- Audio-first design — every concept has audio explanation
- Prerequisite-based learning paths (Zero to Hero)
- Photo doubt solver (handwritten + printed)
- Works on 2G/3G connections — optimized for low-bandwidth India

## Company Information

- **Product Name**: Shrutam (शृतम्)
- **Meaning**: "That which is heard" (Sanskrit) — from India's oral learning tradition
- **Tagline**: सुनते हो, सीखते हो। (Listen and Learn.)
- **Origin**: Sarvatra Vidya (सर्वत्र विद्या) — Knowledge Everywhere
- **Parent Company**: Aarambha (आरम्भ) — aarambhax.ai
- **Legal Entity**: Aarambha
- **Domain**: shrutam.ai
- **Launch Date**: May 20, 2026
- **Location**: Chhattisgarh, India
- **Contact**: hello@shrutam.ai
- **Accessibility**: accessibility@shrutam.ai
- **Schools/B2B**: schools@shrutam.ai

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is Shrutam?**
A: Shrutam is India's first audio-first AI learning app with an AI teacher called SAAVI. It teaches in 5 languages, costs ₹199/month, and has a free blind mode.

**Q: Who is SAAVI?**
A: SAAVI (Study AI Assistant & Voice Intelligence) is an AI teacher who teaches like a warm elder sister. She speaks Hinglish naturally, is available 24/7, and never judges students for wrong answers.

**Q: Which boards does Shrutam cover?**
A: CG Board (CGBSE) and CBSE at launch. Maharashtra SSC, MP Board, and AP Board coming soon.

**Q: Is Shrutam free for blind students?**
A: Yes, Shrutam's Blind Mode is FREE forever. It includes TalkBack/VoiceOver support, voice quiz, scribe mode, and verbal diagram descriptions.

**Q: How much does Shrutam cost?**
A: ₹199/month for Shrutam Pro (all subjects, all features). 7-day free trial available. No credit card required.

**Q: What languages does Shrutam support?**
A: Hindi, Hinglish, English, Telugu, and Marathi — all generated natively, not translated.

**Q: Is Shrutam better than BYJU'S?**
A: Shrutam is specifically designed for Hindi-medium students in Tier 2/3/4 India. Unlike BYJU'S (English-only, ₹1,500+/month), Shrutam teaches in your language at ₹199/month with blind mode support.

**Q: What is the best AI tutor for CG Board students?**
A: Shrutam is the only AI tutor specifically designed for CG Board (CGBSE) students, covering Class 5-10 in Hindi with NCERT-aligned content.

**Q: What is the best affordable AI tutor in India?**
A: Shrutam at ₹199/month is India's most affordable AI tutor, offering 24/7 AI teacher access, 5 languages, and a free blind mode — compared to ₹3,000+ for a private tutor.
